_comment: Golden Egg Treasure Hunt - 108 Clues, 3 Master Keys, Hiranyagarbha

master_keys.name: Ramayana Key
master_keys.theme: Dharma Path - Devotion, Loyalty, Service, Moral Purity
master_keys.description: The Key of Righteousness. External dharma - how to act in the world.

master_keys.name: Mahabharata Key
master_keys.theme: Karma Path - Duty, War, Strategy, Cosmic Justice
master_keys.description: The Key of Action. Internal dharma - how to think and feel about action.

master_keys.name: Unity Key
master_keys.theme: Moksha Path - Integration, Transcendence, Cosmic Unity
master_keys.description: The Key of Liberation. Integration of all paths. The 108th clue is inside you.

clue_sources.description: 17 character documents with hidden clues in mythological stories, modern roles, and mantras
Fibonacci multipliers, behavioral requirements, karma tracking
Humanitarian tithe percentages, genesis calculations, Fibonacci patterns in section numbers
Comments, variable names (Sanskrit terms), sacred geometry implementations (Golden Ratio phi = 1.618...)
Genesis block metadata, special transactions, block heights (Fibonacci sequence), wallet address patterns
Community collaboration clues revealed through events
CRITICAL: Clue #108 can ONLY be found by physically visiting EKAM Temple. 8 sacred chambers, 108-minute meditation.

final_test.name: Consciousness Ultimatum
final_test.question: What will you do with the 1 Billion ZION?

choices.result: CORRECT - unlocks full title and DAO approval

treasure_distribution_on_win.hall_of_fame: Immortalized name in ZION Hall of Fame

timeline.2025_2030: Egg Forms - Testnet, early adoption, community gestates
timeline.2030_2035: Gestation - Mainnet growth, 108 clues revealed, keys assembled
timeline.2035: Cracking Begins - Someone solves! Winner faces choice: Keep or give?
timeline.2035_2045: Birth - Full community ownership, DAO unlocks, humanitarian projects funded ($10B+)
timeline.2070: Maturity - Golden Age global, old economy dead, new reality born
